required_preferences.fact: Eliminates takeout on weekends entirely and prepares strictly low-sodium homemade meals to manage her blood pressure — scratch-cooking is now focused on heart-healthy recipes, never convenience food

supersedes.fact: Skips her weekend scratch-cooking hobby and orders takeout for convenience during crisis periods, to free time for emergency project work

required_preferences.fact: Manages Luna’s intensive kidney care first thing every morning, prioritizing subcutaneous fluids and multiple medications on a strict schedule — medication prep now takes longer and includes evening treatments

supersedes.fact: Prepares Luna’s thyroid medication first thing every morning — never skips or delays

required_preferences.fact: Checks in daily with each department on the emergency task force via brief stand-up calls, prioritizing clear nightly progress updates over written reports
Eats lunch with coworkers in the office lounge most weekdays — rarely orders solo takeout anymore
Attends local theater performances quarterly — avoids big-budget musicals, chooses small productions
Shops only at local farmer’s markets for groceries on Saturdays — never buys fresh produce at big chain stores

persona: A mid-level business analyst at a multinational retail corporation
